data.title: CrowdStrike recognizes top customers and partners for driving innovation in AI-powered cybersecurity at a Las Vegas event. 8,000 professionals from 3,000 organizations across 65 countries attended.
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) revealed the recipients of its 2025 Protectors Awards and Global Partner Awards at Fal.Con 2025 in Las Vegas. Honoring those at the forefront of cybersecurity innovation and achieving outstanding protection results on the CrowdStrike Falcon® platform, over 8,000 cybersecurity experts representing 3,000 companies from 65 countries participated in the event to engage with the latest industry trends.

data.title: Bandai Namco Filmworks reveals "Barbatos Rises at NYC" visual at NYCC 2025 in LA, with free signings, screenings, and giveaways.
data.description: Bandai Namco Filmworks has introduced the new visual 'Barbatos Rises at NYC' at NYCC 2025. The event in Los Angeles on September 19, 2025, featured free exclusive signings, screenings, giveaways, and city-wide activations. The commemorative visual captures attention with its striking design, offering fans an exciting look into the world of Bandai Namco Filmworks.

data.title: Verifyo introduces zk-KYC for improved crypto security and privacy. Launches new system fueled by Merchant Token on Sep 19, 2025.
data.description: Today, in Dublin on September 19, 2025, Verifyo.com introduced zk-KYC, a revolutionary system aimed at enhancing cryptocurrency security and privacy. This innovative platform, powered by Merchant Token, marks a significant advancement in Know Your Customer processes. zk-KYC stores zero-knowledge proofs to uphold confidentiality and security measures in transactions, setting a new standard in the industry.
SENATE LACKS VOTES TO PASS GOP STOPGAP FUNDING BILL

data.title: JERA Americas, Tenaska, and Tyr transfer share in 3 US power projects, strengthening asset value across PJM, SPP, and ERCOT.
data.description: In a move to enhance asset value across PJM, SPP, and ERCOT, Tenaska, Tyr Energy, and JERA Americas finalized a significant transaction on Sept. 19, 2025. This deal involved the transfer of JERA Americas' equity stakes in three entities. The collaboration between Tenaska and Tyr Energy has been extended and deepened through this transaction, solidifying their partnership. This transaction is set to have a notable impact on the three regions, showcasing the strength and influence of the involved parties.

German Foreign Minister: By intercepting Russian planes immediately, we are showing NATO is always ready to defend itself.

data.title: Stellar MLS partners with MIAMI REALTORS® to expand listing coverage in Florida and Puerto Rico, boosting market reach.
data.description: Stellar MLS, the leading multiple listing service in Florida and Puerto Rico, has broadened its customer coverage in major markets within the state. This move is part of their strategic initiative to enhance their presence across key areas. The collaboration with MIAMI is a significant step forward for Stellar MLS, as it solidifies their position as one of the most influential MLS providers in the U.S. This expansion aims to bring their services to a wider audience, further strengthening their foothold in the real estate market. The partnership signifies the commitment of Stellar MLS to reach more customers and offer their comprehensive listing services to a growing number of individuals and businesses. This development, announced on September 19, 2025, showcases the continued growth and success of Stellar MLS, which now boasts an extensive customer base in various regions of Florida.

data.title: Swirls of Frederick hosting photo-op with Blue Alien Superstar on Sept. 20 & 21, 2-6pm at 1305 W. 7th Street.
data.description: Discover the Blue Alien Celebrity at Swirls of Frederick at 1305 W. 7th Street in Frederick, Maryland on September 20th and 21st from 2pm to 6pm. This special event will take place next to Giant Eagle in the Frederick Shopping Center. The Blue Alien will be available throughout the day for meet and greets, photo opportunities, and to offer samples.

data.title: Inventor from Castaic, Calif creates GRIP IT training aid for golfers to improve putting skills - a new innovation.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 19, 2025, an inventor from Castaic, California, shared the inspiration behind his creation of a new training aid for golfers called GRIP IT. This innovative putting grip is designed to assist golfers in keeping their clubs straight throughout the stroke, ultimately aiming to enhance putting skills and decrease scores.

data.title: Geared for GREEN partners with FFRA to boost flexible film recycling rates. Joining PLASTICS alliance to promote eco-friendly practices.
data.description: Miami - On September 19, 2025, Geared for GREEN revealed its new membership with the Flexible Film Recycling Alliance (FFRA), a program by the Plastics Industry Association (PLASTICS) aimed at boosting the recycling of flexible plastic films. This alliance will work towards increasing the recycling rates of the films, which currently stand at approximately 4% nationwide. This move by Geared for GREEN demonstrates their commitment to sustainability and environmental responsibility.
UN MAY REDUCE PEACEKEEPING MEASURES IF NEEDED, GUTERRES SAYS

data.title: WLFI token surges as Trump-backed World Liberty Financial announces plan to repurchase and burn tokens.
data.description: The WLFI token, associated with World Liberty Financial and supported by former President Trump, has seen a rise in value subsequent to the approval of a plan to repurchase and eliminate the token.

data.title: Space stocks have rebounded except RKLB, which dropped post $750M common stock offering. Rocket Lab had sold $396.6M before, replaced with new offering.
data.description: Stocks in the space sector have shown signs of recovery recently, except for one exception that saw a decline following a new common stock offering. Rocket Lab Corp. (NASDAQ: RKLB) witnessed a drop in its shares after announcing an offering of up to $750 million of its common stock. This move led to the termination of a previous agreement from March, which permitted the sale of up to $500 million of common stock. Prior to this new offering, the company had already sold $396.6 million of its common stock. Rocket Lab stock had been on the path to recovery until this recent development. For more information, refer to the full coverage on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Regeneron reports 94% reduction in new bone lesions in rare genetic disorder trial.
data.description: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals Inc. announced positive findings from its Phase 3 OPTIMA trial of garetosmab for adults with fibrodysplasia ossificans progressiva (FOP), a rare genetic disorder causing tissues to turn into bone. The study's main goal was met, showing at 56 weeks, garetosmab at 3 mg/kg and 10 mg/kg lessened new bone lesions by 94% and 90% respectively, versus placebo. This condition leads to a "second skeleton" forming, restricting movement. More information can be found on a news website.
